title: Source Code Indentation Consistency
description: This rule raises an issue when the indentation of the source code does not match the configured value. Consistent indentation not only improves the readability of the code but also reduces differences committed to source control systems, thereby making code reviews easier.
recommendation: Ensure to use consistent indentation in your source code. It is advisable to use spaces instead of tabs for indentation as the width of a tab can be configured differently across various environments leading to inconsistencies.
impact: Inconsistent indentation decreases the readability of the code, making it more tedious to review and modify the code.

checks.message: Ensure to use consistent indentation in your source code. It is advisable to use spaces instead of tabs for indentation as the width of a tab can be configured differently across various environments leading to inconsistencies.
